title: 在线教育用户 RFM 价值分层分析
subtitle: R(最近学习) / F(学习频次) / M(学习时长或付费)
businessGoal: 识别高价值用户、潜力用户与沉睡用户

chapters.title: RFM 介绍与预处理
chapters.content: R = 距最近学习的天数（越小越好）；F = 学习频次；M = 学习时长/付费金额。

codeExamples.title: 读取与描述
codeExamples.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv('sample-rfm.csv')
print(df.describe())

selfCheckQuestions.question: R 越小表示最近越活跃。

chapters.title: 分箱与打分
chapters.content: 使用 pd.qcut 把 R/F/M 分三档并相加。

codeExamples.title: 打分
codeExamples.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv('sample-rfm.csv')
df['R_score'] = pd.qcut(df['recency_days'], 3, labels=[3,2,1]).astype(int)
df['F_score'] = pd.qcut(df['frequency'], 3, labels=[1,2,3]).astype(int)
df['M_score'] = pd.qcut(df['monetary_minutes'], 3, labels=[1,2,3]).astype(int)
df['RFM_total'] = df['R_score']+df['F_score']+df['M_score']
print(df[['user_id','R_score','F_score','M_score','RFM_total']].head())
print(df['RFM_total'].value_counts().sort_index())

chapters.title: 用户分层与标签
chapters.content: 按总分分高价值 / 潜力 / 沉睡用户，并做饼图。

codeExamples.title: 分层
codeExamples.code:
import pandas as pd; import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
df = pd.read_csv('sample-rfm.csv')
df['R_score'] = pd.qcut(df['recency_days'], 3, labels=[3,2,1]).astype(int)
df['F_score'] = pd.qcut(df['frequency'], 3, labels=[1,2,3]).astype(int)
df['M_score'] = pd.qcut(df['monetary_minutes'], 3, labels=[1,2,3]).astype(int)
df['RFM_total'] = df['R_score']+df['F_score']+df['M_score']
def seg(t):
    if t >= 8: return '高价值'
    if t >= 5: return '潜力'
    return '沉睡用户'
df['segment'] = df['RFM_total'].apply(seg)
counts = df['segment'].value_counts(); print(counts)
counts.plot(kind='pie', autopct='%.1f%%', figsize=(5,5))
plt.ylabel(''); plt.title('用户 RFM 价值分层'); plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

selfCheckQuestions.question: 对数值逐行打标签最常用？

exercises.prompt: 把 recency_days 分 5 档，输出各档人数。
exercises.starterCode:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv('sample-rfm.csv')

exercises.prompt: 按 3 档打 RFM 总分并输出高价值用户数。
exercises.starterCode:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv('sample-rfm.csv')

exercises.prompt: 绘制各分层的平均付费金额柱状图。
exercises.starterCode:
import pandas as pd; import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
df = pd.read_csv('sample-rfm.csv')
exercises.sampleAnswer:
df['R_score']=pd.qcut(df['recency_days'],3,labels=[3,2,1]).astype(int)
df['F_score']=pd.qcut(df['frequency'],3,labels=[1,2,3]).astype(int)
df['M_score']=pd.qcut(df['monetary_minutes'],3,labels=[1,2,3]).astype(int)
df['RFM_total']=df['R_score']+df['F_score']+df['M_score']
df['segment']=df['RFM_total'].apply(lambda t: '高价值' if t>=8 else ('潜力' if t>=5 else '沉睡用户'))
df.groupby('segment')['monetary_pay'].mean().plot(kind='bar',color=['#2563eb','#f59e0b','#ef4444'])
plt.ylabel('平均付费金额'); plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

quizzes.question: qcut 是等距分箱。
quizzes.explain: qcut 是等频；cut 是等距。

quizzes.question: 对 Series 逐元素做自定义处理用 .____

finalExam.question: 高价值用户的典型 RFM？
options: 均 ≥2 且 F/M 较高

finalExam.question: RFM 分层后可以对不同层对比平均付费、平均时长。
